apiKey.title: Iron Gate API Key
apiKey.description: The organization's Iron Gate API key (starts with ig_). Required for the extension to communicate with the Iron Gate backend.

apiUrl.title: Iron Gate API URL
apiUrl.description: The base URL for the Iron Gate API endpoint. Defaults to the production API if not set.

firmMode.title: Protection Mode
firmMode.description: Data protection mode. 'audit' = Monitor (detect and log only), 'proxy' = Protect (auto-redact PII before sending).

firmId.title: Firm ID
firmId.description: The organization's firm identifier for event attribution.

firmName.title: Organization Name
firmName.description: Display name for the organization shown in the side panel.
